The knowledge graph (Wikidata) does not appear to contain the necessary data about game durations for the St. Louis Cardinals' 1982 and 2013 National League Championship Series. All attempts to search for entities, properties, or execute SPARQL queries failed due to missing index support or lack of relevant data in the dataset. Real-world knowledge indicates the durations, but the SPARQL query cannot retrieve this information from the provided knowledge graph.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?duration WHERE {
  VALUES ?year {
    1982 2013
  }
  ?series wdt:P31 wd:Q4739182 ; wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) = ?year)
  ?game wdt:P548 ?series ; wdt:P2141 ?duration
}
ORDER BY ?duration
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 2
```

Got no rows and 1 columns
